cascade_issues.title: Loss of optical resolution requirement compliance
cascade_issues.description: Removing the telescope tube will eliminate the primary imaging capability, violating the GSD ≤ 1.5m at nadir requirement.

cascade_issues.title: Thermal control system failure
cascade_issues.description: The thermal panel is removed, which will cause the optical bench temperature to exceed allowable ΔT limits across orbital cycles.

cascade_issues.title: Structural integrity compromised
cascade_issues.description: The removal of the optical subsystem will alter the structural balance and potentially reduce the first natural frequency below the required 80 Hz.

cascade_issues.title: Star tracker alignment issues
cascade_issues.description: Without the optical subsystem, the star tracker may lose its reference point for accurate pointing and attitude determination.

cascade_issues.title: Data processing pipeline invalidation
cascade_issues.description: The data processing algorithms will no longer have valid input from the optical subsystem, rendering them obsolete.

V&V_evidence_impact.description: Simulation results for optical resolution are no longer applicable.
Test results for optical resolution are no longer valid.

open_NCR_impact.description: Thermal gradient analysis is no longer relevant without the optical subsystem.

ECSS_validation_items_impact.activity: Thermal vacuum test at qualification margins (4 cycles min)
ECSS_validation_items_impact.description: Thermal testing is no longer applicable without the optical subsystem.

system_constraints_impact.description: Reduction in mass due to removal of optical subsystem.
No power consumption from the optical subsystem.
